# R and Statistics

Presently we're exploring and working from [Modern Statistics with R](https://www.modernstatisticswithr.com/).

## Notes:

| When            | What                             |
|-----------------|----------------------------------|
| Fri, 24-07-2026 | [variablesFun.r](variablesFun.r) |
|                 |                                  |
|                 |                                  |
|                 |                                  |
|                 |                                  |
|                 |                                  |
|                 |                                  |
|                 |                                  |
|                 |                                  |
|                 |                                  |
